subject: Sports
title: Jesse Owens Defies Hitler
description: Learn Jesse Owens Defies Hitler in one minute.

hook.text: Berlin 1936. Hitler wanted the Olympics to prove Aryan supremacy. One man shattered that narrative.

buildup.text: Jesse Owens, a Black American, arrived in Nazi Germany as an underdog facing enormous hostility.

discovery.text: Owens won four gold medals—100m, 200m, long jump, and 4x100m relay—dominating the Games.

twist.text: German long jumper Luz Long helped Owens qualify by suggesting he adjust his takeoff mark.

climax.text: Owens returned home a hero abroad but was still denied basic civil rights in America.

punchline.text: Four golds crushed a racist ideology on its own stage.

quiz.question: How many gold medals did Jesse Owens win at Berlin 1936?
